pages.purpose: Landing page introducing Demeo and entry points into the operator flow.

important_elements.label: Manifesto / value proposition
important_elements.selector_hint: text=We turn cold outreach into personalized AI demo rooms
important_elements.why: Explains the product in one sentence.

important_elements.label: Try the demo room
important_elements.why: Direct path to the prospect-facing demo room.

important_elements.label: Open dashboard
important_elements.why: Direct path to the founder/operator flow.

pages.purpose: Founder setup page for company and product context.

important_elements.label: One-liner description
important_elements.selector_hint: textarea[placeholder="We help B2B SaaS teams turn cold outreach into qualified pipeline with AI demo rooms."]
important_elements.why: Primary product summary used by agents.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight setup fields
allowed_actions.intent: Show what the founder provides during setup.

pages.purpose: Agent lab for viewing specialist modules.

important_elements.label: Demo Agent
important_elements.why: Links to the prospect-facing demo room.

pages.purpose: Founder dashboard showing the GTM flow and pipeline stages.

important_elements.label: Product context prompt
important_elements.why: Example of the context fed into the operator.

important_elements.label: Demo Room stage
important_elements.why: Shows the demo step in the pipeline.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight pipeline stages
allowed_actions.intent: Show how the product moves from product context to demo and CRM.

pages.purpose: Prospect-facing private demo room with guided questions and chat input.

important_elements.label: Show me how this works for my team
important_elements.selector_hint: button:has-text("Show me how this works for my team")
important_elements.why: Safe preset question to start the demo.

important_elements.label: End & view CRM
important_elements.why: Shows the handoff to lead summary.

allowed_actions.label: View CRM summary
allowed_actions.intent: Show the output after a prospect finishes the demo.

pages.purpose: CRM summary showing lead score, objections, and follow-up draft.

important_elements.label: Send now
important_elements.why: Visible action, but sending is a real outbound operation.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight CRM summary
allowed_actions.intent: Show what the founder receives after the prospect finishes.

important_elements.label: Mission statement
important_elements.selector_hint: text=We believe the next generation of revenue teams will be mostly AI.

pages.purpose: Content Agent page for generating GTM assets.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight content generation
allowed_actions.intent: Show how output is generated from founder context.

pages.purpose: Legal Agent page for issue spotting and educational review.

allowed_actions.label: Highlight legal review
allowed_actions.intent: Show the review step in the agent flow.

flows.goal: Show the full story from founder setup to prospect demo to CRM follow-up.

steps.say: First, the founder adds company and product context.
Next, that context feeds the GTM pipeline and agent stages.
The system can generate GTM content from the profile.
Then the prospect gets a personalized demo room.
Finally, the founder sees the qualified lead and follow-up.

approved_answers.topic: What does the founder need to provide?
approved_answers.answer: A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

approved_answers.topic: Should the runtime click the real app directly?
approved_answers.answer: The MVP should use an approved manifest and visual event playback. Playwright is better for setup-time extraction and validation. Live app control can come later for approved low-risk paths.
Yes. Gemini Live or a LiveKit voice agent can call the same safe demo tools used by text: show page, move cursor, highlight, propose click, answer from knowledge, and update lead memory.

notes: Clicks were avoided except where they are ordinary navigation links; no non-navigational clicks were added.
Selector hints use only crawled page data.
CRM send actions are visible but not approved as actions because they initiate outbound messaging.

decisions.question: What does the founder need to provide?
decisions.reply: The founder provides the product context that powers the demo room.

events.say: Start with founder setup.
They enter company name, product one-liner, industry, and related setup details.
A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

decisions.reason: Best answered by showing the onboarding setup and then using the approved answer.

decisions.question: Show me the agent/content console.
decisions.reply: Here’s the content generation side of the operator flow.

events.say: This is the founder dashboard where the demo is orchestrated.
The product context flows through the pipeline into the demo stage.
Now open the content agent console.
This is where Demeo can generate GTM content from founder context.

decisions.reason: The manifest includes a safe content generation page, which directly demonstrates AI output generation.

decisions.question: Show the prospect demo room.

events.say: This is the personalized prospect demo room.
The prospect can start with a guided question or ask anything.

decisions.reason: This is the exact prospect-facing experience the founder asked to show.

decisions.question: Show me what the founder receives after the demo.
decisions.reply: After the prospect finishes, the founder gets a CRM summary and follow-up draft.

events.say: Now open the CRM summary.
This shows the lead score, objections, and generated follow-up email.

decisions.reason: The CRM page is the approved safe endpoint for post-demo output and qualification.

events.say: Start with founder setup.
They enter company name, product one-liner, industry, and related setup details.
A product or staging URL, sandbox credentials when needed, target persona, demo goals, a short walkthrough, approved Q&A, CTA, and qualification questions.

Now open the content agent console.

The prospect can start with a guided question or ask anything.

question_results.reason: This is the exact prospect-facing experience the founder asked to show.

This shows the lead score, objections, and generated follow-up email.

question_results.reason: The CRM page is the approved safe endpoint for post-demo output and qualification.

success.success_rule: MVP-usable means at least 3/4 expected app areas discovered, at least 6 safe/reviewable actions, no invented manifest pages/action refs, and at least 3/4 prospect questions planned to the right page/action.
